9.reason: [Incorrect cast: BTree is already a pointer type (BTNode*), so casting malloc to (BTree *) results in a double pointer (BTNode**). Should be (BTree) or no cast. Also, missing #include <stdlib.h> for malloc, causing compilation error.]

19.reason: [BST insertion logic error: problem requires right child for values >= root, but this only inserts right when x > root->data, ignoring equality. This causes equal values to be ignored (not inserted), violating BST construction rule. However, since the error type is Compilation Error, this semantic issue is secondary to the missing header and incorrect cast.]
